title: Daily pipeline loop: move deal then open it and confirm stage is consistent
description: Verifies that after moving a deal to a new stage on the Kanban, opening that deal shows the same stage/state in the deal detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the Kanban board of deals to load
Drag a deal card from one stage column to a different stage column
Click the moved deal card to open its detail view
Verify the deal detail view indicates the deal is in the new stage

title: Move a deal to a new stage and keep the board consistent
description: Verifies a user can move a deal card to another Kanban stage and the deal is shown in the target column afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the Kanban board of deals to load
Drag a deal card from one stage column to another stage column
Verify the moved deal card is displayed in the target stage column

title: Open a deal from the Kanban and view deal details
description: Verifies a user can open a deal from the dashboard Kanban and the deal detail view loads with deal context, municipi data, and contacts.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the Kanban board of deals to load
Click a deal card to open its detail view
Verify the deal detail view is displayed with municipi information and a contacts section

title: Create a new contact from within a deal and see it in both deal and directory
description: Verifies a user can create a contact from a deal and the contact appears in the deal contacts list and in the global contacts directory.
category: Create Contact in Deal (Contacts linked to Municipi)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the Kanban board of deals to load
Click a deal card to open its detail view
Open the contact creation form
Fill Test Contact Name into the contact name field
Fill test.contact@example.com into the contact email field
Fill Test Role into the contact role/title field
Save the contact
Click the navigation link to open the contacts directory
Verify the new contact is displayed in the contacts directory list

title: Update municipal address and see it persist in deal detail
description: This test verifies a user can edit a municipi address from within a deal and the updated municipal data is shown in the deal detail and persists after refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a deal card in the Kanban to open its detail view
Click the control to edit municipal data
Fill "Updated Address 123" into the municipi address field
Save changes
Press F5
Verify the municipi address displays as "Updated Address 123" in the deal detail

title: Change SaaS plan and annual investment and see it persist after refresh
description: This test verifies a user can update a deal’s SaaS plan and annual investment and the updated commercial terms display correctly and persist after reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a deal card in the Kanban to open its detail view
Click the control to edit the SaaS plan
Select a different plan type than the currently selected one
Fill "12000" into the annual investment field
Save changes
Press F5
Verify the deal summary shows the newly selected plan type and annual investment "12000"

title: Edit a contact and see the updated contact reflected in the directory list
description: Verifies a user can edit a contact name or role and the updated contact is shown in the contacts list afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /contactes
Wait for the contacts list to load
Click a contact in the list to open its record
Modify the contact role/title field to Updated Role
Save changes
Verify the updated contact is displayed in the contacts list

title: Create a new calendar event linked to a deal or municipi and see it appear
description: This test verifies a user can create an event with date/time and description linked to a deal or municipi and it appears on the calendar after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /calendari
Wait for the calendar view to finish loading
Open the new event form
Select a valid date in the date field
Select a valid time in the time field
Fill "Site visit - Test Event" into the description field
Link the event to a Deal or Municipi context
Save the event
Verify an event with description "Site visit - Test Event" is displayed on the calendar

title: New calendar event remains visible after page reload
description: This test verifies a newly created calendar event persists and is still shown after refreshing the calendar page.

steps.description: Navigate to /calendari
Open the new event form
Select a valid date in the date field
Select a valid time in the time field
Fill "Persistent Event 001" into the description field
Link the event to a Deal or Municipi context
Save the event
Press F5
Verify an event with description "Persistent Event 001" is displayed on the calendar

title: Browse contacts directory and open a contact record
description: Verifies a user can navigate to the contacts directory, see an alphabetic list, and open a contact record for viewing/editing.

steps.description: Navigate to /contactes
Wait for the contacts list to load
Click a contact in the list to open its record
Verify the contact detail/edit view is displayed

title: Change only SaaS plan tier without altering investment
description: This test verifies a user can change the SaaS plan tier while keeping the existing annual investment unchanged in the deal summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a deal card in the Kanban to open its detail view
Note the currently displayed annual investment value
Click the control to edit the SaaS plan
Select a different plan type than the currently selected one
Save changes
Verify the plan type has changed and the annual investment matches the previously noted value

title: Edit both address and population together from deal context
description: This test verifies a user can update multiple municipi fields in one save and the deal detail reflects both updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a deal card in the Kanban to open its detail view
Click the control to edit municipal data
Fill "New Civic Center Ave" into the municipi address field
Fill "54321" into the municipi population field
Save changes
Verify the deal detail shows address "New Civic Center Ave" and population "54321"

title: Cancel municipal data edits without changing displayed values
description: This test verifies a user can abandon municipi edits from a deal and the original municipal data remains unchanged in the deal detail.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a deal card in the Kanban to open its detail view
Note the currently displayed municipi address value
Click the control to edit municipal data
Fill "Temporary Address Change" into the municipi address field
Cancel or close the municipal editor without saving
Verify the municipi address displayed in the deal detail is unchanged from the previously noted value

title: Create an event without linking to a deal/municipi when allowed
description: This test verifies a user can save a general calendar event without selecting a deal or municipi if the UI allows it and it appears on the calendar.

steps.description: Navigate to /calendari
Open the new event form
Select a valid date in the date field
Select a valid time in the time field
Fill "General event no link" into the description field
Save the event
Verify an event with description "General event no link" is displayed on the calendar

title: Prevent saving a deal contact when email is missing
description: Verifies the contact creation form blocks saving when the email field is empty and shows a validation error.
category: Create Contact in Deal (Contacts linked to Municipi)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the Kanban board of deals to load
Click a deal card to open its detail view
Open the contact creation form
Fill Test Contact Missing Email into the contact name field
Fill Test Role into the contact role/title field
Attempt to save the contact
Verify an email-required validation error is visible and the contact is not added to the deal contacts list

title: Prevent saving municipal population when non-numeric
description: This test verifies the municipal editor blocks saving when population is not a number and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a deal card in the Kanban to open its detail view
Click the control to edit municipal data
Fill "twelve thousand" into the municipi population field
Save changes
Verify a population format validation error is visible

title: Block saving SaaS terms when annual investment is negative
description: This test verifies the SaaS plan editor prevents saving when the annual investment is negative and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a deal card in the Kanban to open its detail view
Click the control to edit the SaaS plan
Fill "-100" into the annual investment field
Save changes
Verify an investment value validation error is visible

title: Prevent saving a contact when a required field is cleared
description: Verifies the contact edit form blocks saving when a required field like name is cleared and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /contactes
Wait for the contacts list to load
Click a contact in the list to open its record
Clear the contact name field
Attempt to save changes
Verify a required-field validation error is visible and the contact is not saved

title: Prevent saving municipal population when empty
description: This test verifies the municipal editor shows a validation error and does not save when the population field is cleared.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a deal card in the Kanban to open its detail view
Click the control to edit municipal data
Fill "" into the municipi population field
Save changes
Verify a population validation error is visible

title: Require date when creating a calendar event
description: This test verifies the calendar event form blocks saving when the date is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /calendari
Open the new event form
Fill "Missing date event" into the description field
Link the event to a Deal or Municipi context
Save the event
Verify a date required validation error is visible

title: Cancel creating a calendar event without adding it to the calendar
description: This test verifies a user can cancel out of the new event form and no new event is added to the calendar.

steps.description: Navigate to /calendari
Open the new event form
Fill "Cancelled event should not save" into the description field
Cancel or close the new event form without saving
Verify no event with description "Cancelled event should not save" is displayed on the calendar
